what_to_look_for: In your ICP (set TARGET_SEGMENTS in score_leads.py to match company.yml)
Has a valid email and/or phone
notes: both = 15, one = 10, none = DISQUALIFY (can't work it)
too small (<5) = may not afford; too big (>=250) = likely in-house team

what_to_look_for: Est. revenue above your floor (~$250k default)
notes: floor to afford your offer; below = affordability risk flag
clear 'we can help' signal; fair site = partial credit
visible room to improve market presence

what_to_look_for: Not running paid ads (greenfield) OR running ads (budget exists)
Outside your ICP — not a fit
(If known) already retains an agency / has the internal function
notes: note in 'notes'; treat as low priority / different pitch
work A then B; C = nurture; D = disqualified/weak
